Refer to figures or Flight Planning Manual MRJT 1 Figure 4.7.2.
An aircraft on an extended range operation is required never to be more than 120 minutes from an alternate, based on 1 engine inoperative LRC conditions in ISA.

Using the above table and a given mass of 40 000 kg at the most critical point, the maximum air distance to the relevant alternate is…
